title: Aures - Paintings with Dragons
description: Paintings with dragons by Black Aures in your world! ^3^ No AI!
body:
Curseforge - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paintings-with-dragons

■ This mod adds over 30 pixelized versions of my dragon paintings. Compatible with any mods and works on vanilla picture mechanics. You put a picture and with a chance one of mine may appear. The size will vary from 1x2 to 8x4. They are not perfect, but I think those who love them will be very happy with this little variety :3

■ Credits: all art belongs to me and drawn by me, the mod itself helped to make Nocube (Mcreator). If you wish, you can find my gallery on FA. The characters in the artwork belong to their owners.
■ Some of the art is made in collaboration with Disconnecti (Leo Evans) and Sever.
